---
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Copy this file to blog/<slug>.qmd and edit. Files beginning with an
# underscore are ignored by Quarto, so this template is never published.
#
# Drafts: set `draft: true` and the post disappears from the listing and the
# RSS feed while still rendering locally. Remove the line to publish.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
title: "Post title"
description: "One or two sentences shown in the listing and the RSS feed."
author: "Kostadin Kostadinov"
date: 2026-01-01
date-modified: last-modified
categories: [workflow, methods]
draft: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
body-classes: blog-post
---

Opening paragraph. Give the reader the argument in the first few lines.

::: {.callout-note}
## Callout boxes

`note`, `tip`, `warning`, `important` and `caution` are all available, and can
be made collapsible with `collapse="true"`.
:::

## A section

Mathematics is written inline as $\text{RR} = \frac{a/(a+b)}{c/(c+d)}$, or
displayed:

$$
\text{OR} = \frac{a \cdot d}{b \cdot c}
$$

Code is highlighted automatically:

```r
library(kkstatfun)
kk_or(data, exposure, outcome)
```

Diagrams use Mermaid:

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Raw data] --> B[Cleaning]
  B --> C[Analysis]
  C --> D[Manuscript]
```

Images sit in `blog/images/` and are referenced relatively:

```markdown
![Caption](images/example.png){fig-alt="Describe the image for screen readers."}
```
